name: Woody Allen

acts.description: Dylan Farrow's allegation that Allen sexually abused her at age 7 in 1992
Began secret relationship with Soon-Yi Previn, then 21, the adopted daughter of his partner Mia Farrow, while acting as her father figure

behavior_summary: Accused by his adopted daughter of sexual abuse. Married his partner's other adopted daughter. Has never faced legal accountability. Still making films.

art.summary: One of the defining voices of American intellectual cinema. His films shaped a generation of filmmakers and a specific mode of urban neurotic comedy.

verdict.blurb: He made Manhattan — a film where a 42-year-old man's relationship with a 17-year-old girl is treated as romantic. Then his daughter wrote an open letter about what he did to her at seven. He's still making films. Everyone keeps showing up.
